projects.title: Design Leadership Network
projects.description: Website for a community platform connecting design leaders worldwide.
projects.summary: Website design for a community platform connecting design leaders worldwide.
projects.body:
## Overview

Design Leadership Network is a community platform for senior design leaders to connect, share knowledge, and grow. The project required a website that reflected the quality and credibility of its membership.

## Challenge

The platform needed to communicate trust and exclusivity while remaining approachable. The design had to appeal to senior decision-makers without feeling corporate or cold.

## Solution

We developed a clean, editorial-style design system — strong typography, generous whitespace, and a restrained colour palette that let the community and content take centre stage.

## Results

The new site launched to positive reception from the membership community. Engagement with the platform increased and sign-up conversions improved significantly.

projects.title: Emma
projects.description: Website redesign for a sleep technology brand.
projects.summary: Website redesign for Emma — an award-winning event management and fundraising platform for charities.
projects.body:
## Overview

Emma is an all-in-one event management and fundraising platform built specifically for charities and nonprofits. It helps organisations plan, run, and maximise the impact of their fundraising events — from silent auctions and ticketing to peer-to-peer donations and real-time reporting. Emma serves charities of all sizes, with a mission to give nonprofits access to the most powerful event technology available.

## Challenge

Emma had a strong product and a loyal client base, but their website wasn't keeping pace with the platform's evolution. The visual identity felt dated and the site wasn't clearly communicating Emma's full breadth of features or the scale of impact it enables. They needed a redesign that would position Emma as the clear market leader in charity event management.

## Solution

I redesigned Emma's website with a bold, modern visual direction that matched the ambition behind the platform. The new design led with outcomes — higher ticket sales, bigger donations, smoother events — and structured the page to speak directly to charity event managers who need to justify the investment. Clear feature presentation, strong social proof, and intuitive navigation helped communicate both the power and the approachability of the product.

## Results

The redesigned site gave Emma a significantly stronger market presence, better aligned with their positioning as the most comprehensive event management platform for charities worldwide.

projects.title: Spherex
projects.description: Website for a content compliance and localisation technology platform.
projects.summary: Website design for Spherex — a platform that automates content compliance and localisation for global media.
projects.body:
## Overview

Spherex is a technology platform that helps media companies automate content compliance and cultural localisation. The project was a full website redesign to better communicate their complex technical offering to enterprise buyers.

## Challenge

The core challenge was simplifying a highly technical product without dumbing it down. Enterprise buyers needed to quickly understand what Spherex does, why it matters, and why they should trust it.

## Solution

We built the site around clear use cases and outcomes rather than features. Visual storytelling, structured page hierarchy, and a confident, minimal design language helped communicate authority and reliability.

## Results

The new site improved clarity of messaging significantly. Sales reported that prospects came into conversations better informed about the product.

projects.title: Jiminny
projects.description: Website redesign for a conversation intelligence platform for sales teams.
projects.summary: Website redesign for Jiminny — a conversation intelligence platform that helps sales teams improve performance.
projects.body:
## Overview

Jiminny is a conversation intelligence platform that records, transcribes, and analyses sales calls to help teams coach better and close more. The project was a full website redesign to sharpen positioning and drive demo sign-ups.

## Challenge

The existing site was busy and unfocused. Key messages were buried and the user journey toward booking a demo was unclear. The brand also needed refreshing to better reflect Jiminny's growth and ambition.

## Solution

We simplified the information architecture, tightened the messaging, and redesigned the visual system from the ground up — introducing a cleaner layout language and stronger hierarchy throughout.

## Results

The new site launched with a stronger conversion path and a more confident brand presence. Demo request submissions increased following the launch.

projects.title: Phase Six Online
projects.description: Website for a vocabulary learning platform used by millions of students.
projects.summary: Website redesign for a holistic movement and fitness education platform.
projects.body:
## Overview

Phase SiX is a fitness education platform founded on the belief that strength, mobility, and unconventional movement belong together. Built for coaches, athletes, and dedicated movers, the Phase SiX Method™ blends ground-based movement, joint resilience, and rotational strength into one cohesive system — teaching people not just what to do, but how and why to move.

## Challenge

The previous website was bold but chaotic — too many competing fonts and images, no clear visual flow, and a mobile experience that didn't do justice to a brand that lives on Instagram. Calls to action were inconsistent, sections lacked context, and the site felt too busy for what is essentially a movement philosophy with deep visual appeal.

## Solution

I redesigned the site with a clean, spacious visual language that lets the movement content breathe. The new layout creates a clear entry point for different audiences — coaches, athletes, and casual movers — with structured page flow, consistent CTAs, and a design that feels as intentional and refined as the method it represents.

## Results

A modern, fast-loading website that translates the Phase SiX identity from social media to web — giving visitors a clear path to explore the method, join programs, or attend workshops.

projects.title: N3O
projects.description: Website for a nonprofit technology consultancy.
projects.summary: Website design for N3O — a technology consultancy specialising in digital transformation for the nonprofit sector.
projects.body:
## Overview

N3O is a technology consultancy that helps nonprofit organisations modernise their operations through tailored digital solutions. The project was a full website redesign to better reflect their expertise and attract the right clients.

## Challenge

Nonprofit-focused technology consultancies need to communicate both technical credibility and genuine mission alignment. The site needed to feel trustworthy and human — not cold and corporate.

## Solution

We built the site around clarity and warmth — structured layouts, clear service descriptions, and a visual tone that communicated both competence and care for the sector they serve.

## Results

The new site gave N3O a significantly stronger digital presence and better aligned their visual identity with the quality of their work.

projects.title: Pencil
projects.description: Website for an AI-powered creative ad generation platform.
projects.summary: Website design for Pencil — an AI platform that generates and tests creative ad content at scale.
projects.body:
## Overview

Pencil is an AI-powered platform that helps marketing teams generate, test, and optimise creative ad content at scale. The project was a website redesign to better position them in a rapidly growing market.

## Challenge

The AI creative space is crowded and fast-moving. Pencil needed a site that communicated their specific value clearly and fast — to performance marketers who have seen plenty of AI promises.

## Solution

We led with outcomes over features — showing what Pencil makes possible rather than explaining how it works. The design was energetic and direct, matching the pace of the teams it serves.

## Results

The redesigned site sharpened Pencil's positioning and improved the clarity of their core value proposition for the target audience.

projects.title: Arbitrary Execution
projects.description: Website for a cybersecurity research and advisory firm.
projects.summary: Website design for Arbitrary Execution — a specialist cybersecurity research and advisory firm.
projects.body:
## Overview

Arbitrary Execution is a specialist cybersecurity firm offering research, advisory, and offensive security services. The project was a new website to establish their presence and attract the right enterprise clients.

## Challenge

Cybersecurity is a trust-heavy category where credibility and authority matter more than almost anything else. The site needed to communicate deep expertise without being inaccessible — and feel distinct in a space full of dark, aggressive aesthetics.

## Solution

We took a more refined, editorial approach — clean layouts, precise typography, and a design language that felt authoritative and considered rather than aggressive. The content was structured to demonstrate expertise through specificity.

## Results

The site gave Arbitrary Execution a strong, distinctive presence that set them apart from typical cybersecurity firms.

projects.title: TEDx Website
projects.description: Website design for a TEDx event.
projects.summary: Website design for a TEDx event — bringing the spirit of TED to a local community audience.
projects.body:
## Overview

TEDx events bring the TED format to local communities around the world. This project was a custom website for a TEDx event, designed to generate excitement, communicate the event programme, and drive ticket sales.

## Challenge

The site needed to honour the TED brand while feeling locally rooted and event-specific. It also had to work hard commercially — clearly communicating the programme and making ticket purchase as frictionless as possible.

## Solution

We designed a bold, energetic site that led with speakers and themes, making the event feel unmissable. The structure guided visitors naturally from discovery to ticket purchase with minimal friction.

## Results

The event sold out and the organising team reported the site as a key driver of awareness and ticket conversion.

projects.title: Deepdub
projects.description: Complete website revamp for an AI-powered dubbing platform.
projects.summary: A complete website revamp for Deepdub — an AI-powered dubbing solution that localises content into any language at scale.
projects.body:
## Overview

Deepdub is an AI-powered dubbing platform that helps media companies, streaming services, and content creators localise video content into any language at scale — fast, accurately, and with natural-sounding results.

The project was a complete website revamp. The existing site was dated and didn't reflect the quality or ambition of the product. The goal was to bring the design in line with where the brand was heading — confident, modern, and built for enterprise buyers.

## What I did

Working within the Arch Web Design team, I led the visual design for the new site — from initial concepts through to final Webflow delivery.

The work included:
- Defining a refreshed visual direction: tighter typography, a cleaner layout system, and a colour palette that felt premium without being cold
- Designing all core pages: homepage, product pages, use case pages, and pricing
- Creating a component library in Figma, structured for efficient Webflow development
- Collaborating closely with the developer throughout the build to ensure everything translated cleanly from design to code

## Outcome

The new site gave Deepdub a significantly stronger first impression — one that matched the sophistication of the product it was representing.

> "I recently collaborated with Arch Web Design and was thoroughly impressed by their professionalism and the quality of their work. Their ability to deliver a high-quality, intuitive website exceeded my expectations."
>
> — Zivit Katz, VP Marketing, Deepdub

projects.title: Mode
projects.description: Website for a data analytics and business intelligence platform.
projects.summary: Website redesign for a post-quantum encrypted team communication platform.
projects.body:
## Overview

Mode is a secure team communication platform built for businesses that can't afford to have their data compromised. As cyberattacks grow more sophisticated — including the looming threat of quantum computing — Mode offers post-quantum encryption to protect sensitive conversations and files shared across remote, hybrid, and in-office teams.

## Challenge

Mode's existing website captured the brand's visual identity but fell short of communicating the product's value clearly. The information architecture was unclear, key benefits were buried, and the design relied too heavily on product screenshots rather than conveying the confidence and security the platform promises. The goal was a redesign that felt as secure and progressive as the technology behind it.

## Solution

I redesigned the website with a clean, structured layout — focused on clear messaging, purposeful use of brand colours, and custom illustrations that communicated security without overwhelming the visitor. The new architecture guides users through the product's key benefits logically, with concise copy and strong visual hierarchy that builds trust at each scroll.

## Results

The redesigned site better positions Mode as a credible, forward-thinking security platform — moving away from a template feel toward something that reflects the seriousness of post-quantum encryption.

projects.title: Cold Email
projects.description: Website for a cold email outreach platform.
projects.summary: Brand new website for a premium cold email lead generation agency.
projects.body:
## Overview

Cold.Email is a specialist lead generation agency focused entirely on cold email outreach. Unlike competitors who rely on Clay-based workflows or broad digital marketing tools, Cold.Email targets businesses that need direct, high-quality outreach to book sales calls — positioning itself as the premium option in the space.

## Challenge

The agency had no website at all. With strong results and a clear market position, they needed a site built from scratch that would immediately signal quality and convert visitors into booked calls. The challenge was translating a founder-led personal brand and bold voice into a website that felt polished and premium — not scrappy.

## Solution

I designed a conversion-focused site that leaned into the agency's confidence and results. The design is clean and direct — no filler content, every section earns its place. The visual language communicates premium positioning, while the copy and structure drive visitors toward a single action: booking a call.

## Results

A brand new web presence that positions Cold.Email as the high-end option in a crowded agency market, built to convert the right clients.

projects.title: Hike SEO
projects.description: Website for an SEO platform designed for small businesses.
projects.summary: Website redesign for an AI-powered done-for-you SEO service for small businesses.
projects.body:
## Overview

Hike SEO provides an affordable, done-for-you SEO solution aimed at micro-businesses — builders, plumbers, electricians, and one-person operations who need leads from Google but can't afford agency fees or the time to learn SEO themselves. Their AI agent handles all the expert decision-making and implementation on the client's behalf.

## Challenge

Hike's existing website had clear structure and brand identity but felt dated and no longer communicated the product's value effectively. The imagery was weak, the pricing page was confusing, and the site had grown slow. It needed a complete refresh that matched the warmth and approachability of the brand while better converting visitors into subscribers.

## Solution

I redesigned the site with a clean, friendly aesthetic that reflects Hike's voice — assured and warm without being corporate. The new layout simplifies the user journey toward sign-up, improves the communication of the product's unique value proposition, and replaces outdated imagery with visuals that feel relevant and modern.

## Results

A refreshed website that clearly communicates what Hike does, who it's for, and why it's the right choice — removing friction from the path to conversion.

projects.title: Aperios
projects.description: Website for a financial services technology company.
projects.summary: Website design for a cybersecurity firm protecting small businesses from modern threats.
projects.body:
## Overview

Aperios is a cybersecurity company built specifically for small and medium-sized businesses. They combine offensive security testing with rapid incident response — helping SMBs uncover threats before attackers do, and recover fast if something gets through. Their approach removes the enterprise-level complexity that typically makes security inaccessible to smaller teams.

## Challenge

Aperios had no existing website. They needed a site built from scratch that could communicate complex security concepts in a way that felt approachable and trustworthy to non-technical business owners — not intimidating like typical cybersecurity brands. The goal was to evoke peace of mind, confidence, and clarity.

## Solution

I designed a clean, modern site that speaks directly to the SMB audience — using plain language, structured content, and a calm visual tone that contrasts with the fear-driven aesthetic common in the security industry. Every design decision was focused on building trust and making Aperios feel like an expert partner, not a faceless vendor.

## Results

A new web presence that positions Aperios as the approachable, expert cybersecurity partner for SMBs — ready to compete against enterprise solutions and local IT shops alike.

projects.title: Teamclass
projects.description: Website for a corporate team-building and learning experiences platform.
projects.summary: Website design for Teamclass — a platform connecting companies with team-building and learning experiences.
projects.body:
## Overview

Teamclass connects companies with curated team-building experiences and workshops. The project was a website redesign to better serve both corporate buyers and experience providers.

## Challenge

The platform needed to inspire and reassure at the same time — helping corporate buyers discover experiences while feeling confident about the quality and logistics.

## Solution

We designed a marketplace-inspired layout that made discovery easy, with strong visual hierarchy and clear paths for both buyer types.

## Results

Coming soon.

projects.title: Uptrail
projects.description: Website for a talent acquisition and recruiting platform.
projects.summary: Website design for Uptrail — a talent acquisition platform for modern recruiting teams.
projects.body:
## Overview

Uptrail is a talent acquisition platform that helps recruiting teams manage candidates and collaborate more effectively. The project was a website redesign to sharpen their positioning.

## Challenge

The recruiting tech market is saturated. Uptrail needed to communicate what made their approach different — particularly their focus on collaboration and candidate experience.

## Solution

We built the site around the recruiter's journey, showing how Uptrail fits into existing workflows rather than asking teams to change everything.

## Results

Coming soon.

projects.title: Purple Farm Genetics
projects.description: Brand and website for an agricultural genetics company.
projects.summary: Brand identity and website design for Purple Farm Genetics — an agricultural genetics company.
projects.body:
## Overview

Purple Farm Genetics is an agricultural genetics company developing improved plant varieties. The project was a brand identity and website to establish their presence.

## Challenge

Agriculture is a traditional industry, but genetics is cutting-edge science. The brand needed to bridge both worlds — credible to farmers and scientists alike.

## Solution

We developed a brand that felt grounded and natural while communicating precision and innovation. The website followed the same principle — accessible language, clean design, strong photography.

## Results

Coming soon.

projects.title: Piiano
projects.description: Website for a data privacy vault and infrastructure company.
projects.summary: Website redesign for a developer infrastructure platform that protects sensitive data.
projects.body:
## Overview

Piiano builds security infrastructure for developers — tools that help engineering teams protect sensitive customer data, prevent breaches, and meet data privacy compliance requirements in cloud applications. Founded by a team of security experts, Piiano sits at the intersection of developer tooling and enterprise-grade data protection.

## Challenge

Piiano's existing website had already brought in paying customers, but parts of it were becoming outdated. The focus on privacy engineering was no longer accurate, and the site needed to evolve alongside the product. The redesign needed to feel elegant, instil trust, and clearly communicate that building secure, compliant infrastructure with Piiano is achievable — not overwhelming.

## Solution

I redesigned the site with a sophisticated visual tone that matches the product's technical credibility. Clean layout, precise copy, and a structured presentation of the platform's core value help developers and security teams quickly understand what Piiano does and why it's the right choice over alternatives like Skyflow.

## Results

A refined website that elevates Piiano's positioning as the trusted infrastructure layer for sensitive data — communicating elegance and expertise to both technical and non-technical decision makers.

projects.title: Software Secured
projects.description: Website for a penetration testing and application security company.
projects.summary: Website redesign for a Canadian penetration testing firm helping companies achieve security compliance.
projects.body:
## Overview

Software Secured is a penetration testing company based in Canada, helping software companies meet security compliance requirements — SOC 2, ISO 27001, PCI, HIPAA — and defend against real-world breaches. Their team of full-time, highly trained security professionals runs comprehensive manual pentests, averaging four times more vulnerabilities found per test than leading competitors.

## Challenge

Software Secured's old website was underperforming on every front. The hero image was a generic stock photo, the design was outdated, the colour usage was heavy, and pages didn't flow together — leading to high exit rates and poor conversion. The site was pushing too many features in the wrong places and failing to connect with the buyers who needed to trust them most.

## Solution

I redesigned the site with a cleaner, more modern visual language — strong use of white space, custom illustrations instead of stock imagery, and a tighter information architecture that guides visitors from problem to solution. The new design prioritises the credibility signals that matter to security buyers: methodology, expertise, and proof of results.

## Results

A significantly improved web presence that speaks directly to security-conscious buyers, reduces friction in the sales funnel, and positions Software Secured as the high-quality, trustworthy option in a competitive market.

projects.title: Rosalyn
projects.description: Website for an AI-powered online proctoring and exam integrity platform.
projects.summary: Website redesign for an AI-powered online exam proctoring platform.
projects.body:
## Overview

Rosalyn is an AI-powered proctoring platform designed for the post-pandemic era of online education. It helps institutions prevent cheating on online exams — identity fraud, browser violations, and unauthorized materials — while delivering a respectful, privacy-conscious experience for students. Rosalyn is 80% more cost effective than traditional proctoring solutions and works even in low-bandwidth environments.

## Challenge

Rosalyn's existing website had a visual identity they were happy with — the colours, graphics, and fonts were on point — but the layout wasn't working. The site wasn't communicating the platform's unique advantages clearly enough to differentiate from established competitors like Honorlock, Proctorio, and ProctorU.

## Solution

I redesigned the layout to better structure the narrative flow — leading with the credibility problem online education faces, then clearly presenting Rosalyn's breakthrough approach. The design builds on the existing brand strengths while improving clarity, hierarchy, and the emotional arc from first impression to conversion.

## Results

A redesigned website that better communicates Rosalyn's differentiated value — positioning it as the modern, accessible alternative in a market dominated by expensive, friction-heavy legacy solutions.

projects.title: Canvas Envision
projects.summary: Website redesign for an AI-powered work instructions platform for manufacturers.
projects.body:
## Overview

Canvas Envision is a manufacturing software platform that uses AI to transform PDFs, videos, and 3D models into interactive, intelligent work instructions. It helps manufacturers move away from disconnected, outdated documentation workflows — making it faster and easier to create, update, and distribute accurate instructions to the frontline.

## Challenge

The existing Canvas Envision website had significant structural problems: a confusing mega menu, poor CTA buttons, separate legacy and current sites to manage, and a template look that didn't reflect the platform's innovation. The content was poorly organised — legal pages were one massive block, the about section lacked depth, and past webinars had no links to replays.

## Solution

I redesigned the website from the ground up with a clear, modern visual direction inspired by software-forward design. The new structure consolidates the platform's offering into a logical hierarchy — platform, solutions, use cases, and resources — with strong CTAs, consistent branding, and a design language that signals both precision and innovation to manufacturing decision-makers.

## Results

A fully rebuilt web presence that positions Canvas Envision as the intelligent, forward-thinking choice for manufacturers ready to modernise their documentation workflows.
